title: Spear — Field OS · KILROY · NEXUS C2
motto: Normal needs Field Drive. Four programs. KILROY field-native. NEXUS C2 local sealed.

stack.field_memory: spear fieldmem / kilroy-ensure (DRAM+VRAM pools → logical field memory)

nexus_c2.motto: C2 is the only command surface. Local, sealed, capability-gated, born with the kernel.

next_runtime: ioctl + bench on physical TEAM after rootfs refresh
iPXE lab config for PXE entry

boot_menu.timeout_reason: No auto-boot until operator chooses; Field Drive is required
boot_menu.vga_policy: vga=normal on default paths to exit vesamenu FB cleanly

entries.label: Normal - Spear desktop (needs Field Drive)
entries.note: Full desktop when SPEARFIELD present; default menu entry

entries.label: Create Field Drive - wipe disk | detailed picker
Normal with splash (experimental)
entries.note: quiet splash after vga=normal path proven

field_drive.label: SPEARFIELD
field_drive.capacity_note: field_logical from PAK/RLE/REF/CHIP die — never fake free bits

security.model: Qubes-informed compartmentalization without full Xen day-one
rules: No surprise network: firstboot never auto-opens Queen/browser
Field1/FFAT is trusted field storage; detect SPEARMBR not only SPEARFIELD label
NEXUS C2 loopback-only with capability gates
autoelevate allowlist — not polkit prompt surface

honesty.casper_mint_iso: Compat live path for Cinnamon GUI testing; product boot of record remains KILROY limine+initrd
honesty.vga_corruption_2026_07_13: vesamenu FB handoff left rainbow text — fixed with vga=normal + text menu + serial
honesty.not_full_qubes: We adopt Qubes principles; we do not claim to ship full Qubes/Xen isolation yet
